allow: Bash(uv run python -c "import torch; print\(f'PyTorch {torch.__version__}'\); print\(f'CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available\(\)}'\); print\(f'CUDA version: {torch.version.cuda}' if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'No CUDA'\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "import gymnasium; import stable_baselines3; print\(f'Gymnasium {gymnasium.__version__}'\); print\(f'SB3 {stable_baselines3.__version__}'\)")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import importlib.metadata as meta
pkgs = ['torch', 'torchaudio', 'torchvision', 'gymnasium', 'stable-baselines3', 'numpy', 'tensorboard', 'shimmy', 'pygame', 'pillow', 'pandas', 'box2d-py', 'swig']
for p in pkgs:
    try: print\(f'{p:25s} {meta.version\(p\)}'\)
    except: pass
")
